name: claude-inventory-tool
description: See, organize, and clean up your Claude Code skills, plugins, MCP servers, and agents — split by global vs. project.
comment:deps: The published package is the CLI (bin/cli.mjs + public/scan.mjs), which uses only Node built-ins — so it has no runtime dependencies and `npx claude-inventory-tool` installs nothing extra. next/react/react-dom power the web app and are dev/build-only (Vercel installs devDependencies during the build).
